languages.text: "Тервантьяс утверждает, что Нунциус — обыкновенный сервочереп, и в нем нет ничего достойного внимания".
"Tervantias dismisses Nuncius as nothing more than a common servo-skull, claiming there is nothing noteworthy about him."
languages.original_text: "Тервантьяс утверждает, что Нунциус — обыкновенный сервочереп, и в нем нет ничего достойного внимания".

traits.locale_text: "Tervantias dismisses Nuncius as nothing more than a common servo-skull, claiming there is nothing noteworthy about him."

languages.text: "Tervantias degradiert Nuncius zu einem gewöhnlichen Servoschädel, indem er behauptet, er wäre nicht der Rede wert."
languages.original_text: "Tervantias dismisses Nuncius as nothing more than a common servo-skull, claiming there is nothing noteworthy about him."

traits.locale_text: "Tervantias degradiert Nuncius zu einem gewöhnlichen Servoschädel, indem er behauptet, er wäre nicht der Rede wert."

languages.text: « Tervantias affirme que Nuncius n'est qu'un servocrâne comme les autres et qu'il ne présente pas le moindre intérêt. »
languages.original_text: "Tervantias dismisses Nuncius as nothing more than a common servo-skull, claiming there is nothing noteworthy about him."

traits.locale_text: « Tervantias affirme que Nuncius n'est qu'un servocrâne comme les autres et qu'il ne présente pas le moindre intérêt. »

languages.text: «Tervantias afirma que Nuncius es solo un servocráneo común y que no tiene nada de especial».
languages.original_text: "Tervantias dismisses Nuncius as nothing more than a common servo-skull, claiming there is nothing noteworthy about him."

traits.locale_text: «Tervantias afirma que Nuncius es solo un servocráneo común y que no tiene nada de especial».

languages.text: "Tervantias, Nuncius'u sıradan bir hizmeletten başka bir şey değil diyerek kestirip attı. Onunla ilgili dikkate değer hiçbir şey olmadığını iddia etti."
languages.original_text: "Tervantias dismisses Nuncius as nothing more than a common servo-skull, claiming there is nothing noteworthy about him."

traits.locale_text: "Tervantias, Nuncius'u sıradan bir hizmeletten başka bir şey değil diyerek kestirip attı. Onunla ilgili dikkate değer hiçbir şey olmadığını iddia etti."

languages.text: “特万提亚斯认为努恩修斯就是颗普通的伺服头骨，根本不值一提。”
languages.original_text: "Tervantias dismisses Nuncius as nothing more than a common servo-skull, claiming there is nothing noteworthy about him."

traits.locale_text: “特万提亚斯认为努恩修斯就是颗普通的伺服头骨，根本不值一提。”

languages.text: 「テルヴァンティアスは、ヌンキウスをありふれたサーヴォスカルにすぎないと切り捨て、彼には何ら注目すべき点はないと言っている」
languages.original_text: "Tervantias dismisses Nuncius as nothing more than a common servo-skull, claiming there is nothing noteworthy about him."

traits.locale_text: 「テルヴァンティアスは、ヌンキウスをありふれたサーヴォスカルにすぎないと切り捨て、彼には何ら注目すべき点はないと言っている」
